title: Main elements
description: Name of the purse seine vessel as available from the IOTC Record of Authorised Vessel ([RAV](https://rav.iotc.org/))

title: Main elements
description: IOTC registered number of the purse seine vessel as available from the IOTC Record of Authorised Vessel ([RAV](https://rav.iotc.org/))

title: Main elements
description: Day of the month of the fishing activities reported through the dataset

title: Main elements
description: The date and time at which the drifting floating object was visited in Coordinated Universal Time ([UTC](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coordinated_Universal_Time))

title: Main elements
description: The latitude of the drifting floating object location, expressed in decimal degrees according to the WGS 84 reference system (EPSG:4326). Recommended precision: four decimal places (~10 m)

title: Main elements
description: The longitude of the drifting floating object location, expressed in decimal degrees according to the WGS 84 reference system (EPSG:4326). Recommended precision: four decimal places (~10 m)

title: Buoy
description: Indicates whether a buoy is attached to the drifting floating object

description: Unique identifier of buoy monitored generally composed of the concatenation of the buoy model with with 5-9 digits

description: Indicates whether the vessel have access/knowledge of the buoy position
